summary: Started delivery work for the real AI boundary, including settings-backed configuration lookup, OpenAI-compatible requests, and project generation integration.
Implemented a real AI service boundary, removed the runtime mock AI dependency, wired project persistence to the new service, and updated the settings screen for explicit AI configuration input.
